prestazioni: Upgrade to a **McLaren Special Operations (MSO) M838T 3.8L V8** with a **Garrett GT35R twin-turbocharger kit** (hybrid ceramic ball-bearing core, 64mm compressor wheel, 62mm turbine wheel) paired with **Precision Turbo & Engine wastegates (46mm, dual-port)** and **Tial MV-R 50mm blow-off valves** to support 850whp on **VP Racing Fuels Q16 (116 octane)** with a **McLaren MSO bespoke ECU remap** (optimized for 28psi peak boost, 8,500rpm redline, and 12.5:1 air-fuel ratio under full load).

Install **Pankl Racing Systems forged internals** (titanium connecting rods, 9.0:1 compression forged pistons, and a billet crankshaft) with **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs** and **Ferrea Racing 6000-series intake/exhaust valves** (1mm oversized, Inconel exhaust valves) to handle sustained 9,000rpm operation. Pair with a **Dry Sump Systems (DSS) 8-stage oil pump** and **Setrab 50-row oil cooler** for thermal stability.

Replace the stock **SSC (Speed Shift Control) 7-speed dual-clutch transmission** with a **GearTek GR6000 sequential gearbox** (dog-ring engagement, 600Nm torque capacity) featuring a **Penske 8760 adjustable LSD** and **Tilton triple-plate carbon clutch**. Add a **McLaren MSO carbon-fiber driveshaft** and **AP Racing CP8450 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake calipers** with **Brembo HTC64T 400mm front/380mm rear carbon-ceramic rotors** for 2,000hp+ braking capability.
estetica: Fit a **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS 650S Spider widebody kit** (carbon-fiber fenders with 50mm extended wheel arches, custom front splitter, and rear diffuser) paired with a **Vorsteiner V-FF107 carbon-fiber rear wing** (adjustable 3-position angle, 1,200mm span) for 400kg downforce at 250km/h.

Install **HRE P101SC 20x10.5 ET45 front / 21x13 ET50 rear wheels** (forged 3-piece, 9.5kg front/11.5kg rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R20 front, 325/25 R21 rear)** with **H&R TRAK+ Sport coilover spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear)** for aggressive stance and track alignment.

Replace all exterior lighting with **Lux HID 55W Bi-Xenon projectors (6000K, CRI 95+)** and **Oracle Lighting RGB+A halo rings (12-mode, 30,000-hour lifespan)**. Add **McLaren MSO carbon-fiber mirror caps** and **Aeromotions AMS-10 active rear spoiler** (hydraulic actuation, 0-60° adjustment, 0.1s response time) for dynamic aero control.
